revisions.what_changed: Initial workshop: 6 content tabs filled from financial model data, M21 subscription research, competitive intelligence, and price testing log. Subscription-first pricing architecture with $59 base, 15% subscription discount, wave-gated SKU roadmap.
revisions.quality_rationale: Strong evidence base from existing project data (financial model, competitive intel, M21). Confidence limited by PT-001 still running and lack of real customer data. All claims properly graded. Dialogue produced 4 upgrades including HYP-004 revision flag.
